description_long: This object is a compact, spherical hand grenade with a matte olive-green body and a white, ribbed safety cap. The lower portion of the body features a textured, crosshatched grip for secure handling. A prominent metal safety lever and pull ring are attached to the top, indicating a classic pin-and-lever detonation mechanism. Faint stenciled markings are visible on the body, suggesting identification or manufacturing details. The overall construction appears robust, with the main body likely made of metal and the cap of a durable polymer or metal. The design is utilitarian, optimized for easy gripping and rapid deployment in urban environments.
description: A compact, olive-green hand grenade with a white safety cap, metal lever, and pull ring. The body is textured for grip and features faint stenciled markings.
description_view_0: The grenade's olive-green body and white cap are clearly visible, with the safety lever and pull ring on the right side.
description_view_1: A direct view of the safety lever and pull ring, showing the lever's length and attachment to the cap.
description_view_2: The side view highlights the stenciled markings and the alignment of the lever and ring with the cap.
description_view_3: The back of the grenade, showing the smooth, rounded body and the ribbed white cap with minimal visible hardware.
attribute_detonation_mechanism: The grenade is equipped with a metal safety lever and pull ring, indicating a pin-and-lever detonation mechanism that is activated by pulling the ring and releasing the lever.
